stereo_full_chain.error_message: frames must be a 2D array or iterable, got <class 'madmom.audio.signal.FramedSignal'> with shape (150, 2048, 2).

fixture_files.framing.npz: FramedSignalProcessor(frame_size=2048,fps=100) frame0/frame1/last frame + all-frames hash, per raw test wav (incl. multi-channel)
fixture_files.stft.npz: ShortTimeFourierTransformProcessor() complex STFT of mono-compatible signals + window-caching-gotcha demonstration
fixture_files.filterbank.npz: FilteredSpectrogramProcessor filterbank matrix (per sample rate) + filtered spectrogram outputs
fixture_files.full_chain.npz: SequentialProcessor([frames,stft,filt,spec]) end-to-end output per mono-compatible test wav
fixture_files.beats_hmm.npz: BarStateSpace/BarTransitionModel/RNNDownBeatTrackingObservationModel metadata + CSR ground truth, beats_per_bar in {3,4}
fixture_files.dbn_downbeat.npz: DBNDownBeatTrackingProcessor(beats_per_bar=[3,4],fps=100) decode of a synthetic ~30s beat-activation array
